title: GitHub Actions Workflows
text: Trigger: repository_dispatch (type: ratings-trigger) manual workflow_dispatch Two-job pipeline computes TORP ratings builds match predictions. : compute-ratings – Runs data-raw/03-ratings/run_ratings_pipeline.R rebuild player game data TORP ratings, uploads torpdata build-predictions – Runs data-raw/02-models/build_match_predictions.R generate weekly match predictions Manual trigger: Actions tab > “Daily Ratings & Predictions” > “Run workflow” force – Force run, skip checks week_override – Override prediction week (leave empty auto-detect) failure: Automatically creates/updates GitHub issue bug + automation labels.

title: Data Architecture
text: torpverse consists three packages:

title: Data Architecture
text: Collection: Raw data fetched AFL API via fitzRoy Processing: torp cleans data, adds EP/WP/shot model predictions Storage: Processed data uploaded torpdata GitHub releases parquet files Loading: torp’s load_*() functions download torpdata demand Models: Trained models stored torpmodels, loaded via load_model_with_fallback()
code: AFL API (fitzRoy) --> torp (clean + enrich) --> torpdata (store)                           |                      torpmodels (models)                           |                      torp (predict)

code: library(torp)  # Single season pbp <- load_pbp(2025)  # Specific rounds pbp <- load_pbp(2025, rounds = 1:10)  # All available data (2021+) pbp_all <- load_pbp(TRUE, rounds = TRUE) chains_all <- load_chains(TRUE) stats_all <- load_player_stats(TRUE)

title: Using Prediction Models
code: library(torp)  # 1. Load and clean play-by-play data pbp <- load_pbp(2025, rounds = 1:10) pbp_clean <- clean_pbp(pbp)  # 2. Add expected points pbp_ep <- add_epv_vars(pbp_clean)  # 3. Add win probability (requires EP variables) pbp_wp <- add_wp_vars(pbp_ep)  # 4. For shots, add outcome probabilities shots <- pbp_wp[!is.na(pbp_wp$shot_at_goal), ] shots <- add_shot_vars(shots)

title: Using Prediction Models
text: EP model predicts expected point outcome possession based field position game state. ’s XGBoost model outputs probabilities five outcomes: Opposition goal (6 pts opposition) Opposition behind (1 pt opposition) score (end quarter) Team behind (1 pt team) Team goal (6 pts team) delta_epv column foundation TORP player rating system – measures much action changed expected outcome.
code: pbp_ep <- add_epv_vars(pbp_clean)  # Key columns added: # exp_pts    -- expected point value of possession # delta_epv  -- change in expected points from the play

title: Using Prediction Models
text: WP model estimates team’s probability winning point match. uses enhanced ensemble approach combines XGBoost model baseline model. Features used: score differential, time remaining, expected points field position, home/away status, recent scoring momentum.
code: # Requires EP variables first pbp_wp <- add_wp_vars(pbp_ep)  # Key columns added: # wp           -- win probability for the team with possession # wpa          -- win probability added by the play # wp_category  -- descriptive label (very_likely, likely, toss_up, etc.) # high_leverage -- flag for high-impact situations

title: Using Prediction Models
text: shot model predicts outcomes shots goal using GAM (Generalised Additive Model). produces three-class probabilities: Features used: shot distance, shot angle, shot type (set shot vs general play), pressure indicators, time quarter.
code: shots <- add_shot_vars(shots)  # Key columns added: # goal_prob     -- probability of goal # behind_prob   -- probability of behind # clanger_prob  -- probability of miss/clanger # xscore        -- expected score (6 * goal_prob + behind_prob) # on_target_prob -- probability of scoring (goal + behind)

title: Using Prediction Models
text: Models loaded torpmodels first use cached memory:
code: # Install torpmodels for latest models devtools::install_github("peteowen1/torpmodels")  # Direct model access ep_model <- torpmodels::load_torp_model("ep") wp_model <- torpmodels::load_torp_model("wp") shot_model <- torpmodels::load_torp_model("shot")  # Clear model cache (e.g., after updating torpmodels) clear_model_cache()

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: TORP (Total Overall Rating Points) player rating system evaluates AFL players based contributions across four skill categories. component measures different aspect -field value using play--play expected points data. overall rating : wt sum exponentially decayed game weights prior provides Bayesian shrinkage players limited data.
code: torp = recv/(wt + prior_recv) + disp/(wt + prior_disp)      + spoil/(wt + prior_spoil) + hitout/(wt + prior_hitout)

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: Measures value player adds kicks handballs, based change expected points (delta EPV) disposal. Adjusted game context (possessing vs defending) penalised bounces.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: Captures value receiving disposal. player receives ball, EPV change attributed receiver well disposer, recognising getting right position creates value.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: Evaluates defensive impact spoils, tackles, pressure acts. Defensive-half pressure acts subtracted (indicate opposition progressed ball) pressure tackle actions rewarded.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: Quantifies ruck contribution hitouts, hitouts advantage, ruck contests. Hitouts advantage weighted higher general hitouts, ruck contests (hitout won) penalised slightly.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: TORP uses exponential decay weight recent games heavily: default decay RATING_DECAY_DEFAULT_DAYS (486 days). game played today weight 1.0; game one year ago weight ~0.47.
code: weight = exp(-days_since_game / decay_days) # Shorter decay emphasises recent form ratings_recent <- calculate_torp_ratings(decay = 200)  # Longer decay for career perspective ratings_career <- calculate_torp_ratings(decay = 730)

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: Players games shrunk toward zero prevent extreme ratings small samples. component prior: player 20 weighted games disposal data rating divided 20 + 7.14 = 27.14 instead just 20, pulling extreme values toward mean.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: aggregation, component’s raw credit points adjusted subtracting position-group baseline (30th percentile within position group). ensures players compared fairly across positions – midfielder’s disposal volume isn’t directly compared key forward’s.

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: repeated calls (e.g., computing ratings many rounds), pre-load data :
code: player_game_data <- load_player_game_data(TRUE) player_details <- load_player_details(2025)  ratings <- calculate_torp_ratings(   season_val = 2025,   round_val = 15,   plyr_tm_df = player_details,   player_game_data = player_game_data )

title: TORP Player Ratings
text: raw credit points component use optimised weights defined R/constants.R. tuned via leave-one-season-cross-validation minimise RMSE predicting match margins team TORP totals. See data-raw/03-ratings/optimize_torp_ratings.R optimisation procedure.

title: Season Simulation
text: simulate_season() function simulates remaining AFL matches based team ratings fixture data. Run many simulations generate probabilistic forecasts finals qualification, ladder positions, premiership chances.

title: Season Simulation
text: unplayed match, simulation: Calculates expected margin team TORP rating difference Adds home ground advantage (SIM_HOME_ADVANTAGE = 6 points) Adds random noise (SIM_NOISE_SD = 26 points) reflect game--game variance Records simulated result Completed matches keep actual results.

title: Season Simulation
code: library(torp)  # simulate_season() requires: # - sim_teams: data frame with team ratings (one row per team) # - sim_games: fixture data with NA results for unplayed games sim_result <- simulate_season(sim_teams, sim_games)

title: Season Simulation
text: probabilistic forecasts, run many simulations aggregate:
code: n_sims <- 1000  all_sims <- lapply(seq_len(n_sims), function(i) {   sim <- simulate_season(sim_teams, sim_games)   sim$sim_id <- i   sim })  all_sims_df <- data.table::rbindlist(all_sims)

title: Season Simulation
code: library(dplyr)  # Finals probability by team finals_prob <- all_sims_df |>   group_by(sim_id) |>   arrange(desc(wins), desc(percentage)) |>   mutate(ladder_pos = row_number()) |>   ungroup() |>   group_by(team) |>   summarise(     top_4_pct = mean(ladder_pos <= 4) * 100,     top_8_pct = mean(ladder_pos <= 8) * 100,     avg_wins = mean(wins)   ) |>   arrange(desc(top_8_pct))  finals_prob

title: torp 0.0.0.9003 (development)
text: load_pbp() load_chains() now default rounds = TRUE (rounds) instead current week. Callers relied getting latest round without specifying rounds now receive full season. Use rounds = get_afl_week() restore old behaviour. load_from_url() now defaults use_disk_cache = FALSE (previously TRUE). Pass use_disk_cache = TRUE explicitly want persistent disk caching. load_fixtures(= TRUE) now starts 2021 (previously 2018). Seasons 2021 outside validate_seasons() range producing errors. check_internet_connection() removed. Use curl::has_internet() directly.

title: torp 0.0.0.9003 (development)
text: Local-first data loading: load_*() functions now check torpdata/data/ first, disk cache, download. Downloaded files auto-saved locally. download_torp_data() bulk-downloading parquet files offline access. Parallel downloads: Multi-URL loads use curl::multi_download() faster batch fetching. Negative cache (skip markers): 404 URLs marked .skip files avoid repeated failed downloads. Use clear_skip_markers() retry. Column selection: load_*() functions accept columns parameter read specific columns. New load functions: load_ep_wp_charts(), load_player_game_ratings(), load_player_season_ratings(), load_team_ratings(). CREDIT_POS_ADJ_QUANTILE split 4 per-dimension constants: CREDIT_POS_ADJ_QUANTILE_RECV, _DISP, _SPOIL, _HITOUT.

title: torp 0.0.0.9003 (development)
text: parquet_from_urls_parallel() now warns instead silently dropping data column selection finds matching columns. parquet_from_urls_parallel() now errors (instead just warning) downloads completely fail local data available. mark_download_skippable() now logs write errors instead silently swallowing . read_local_parquet() now deletes files likely corruption errors, transient failures (memory, locking). load_torp_ratings() load_team_ratings() now warn returning empty data. load_from_url() now warns round filtering requested round column exists data. Integration test data loading now guarded CRAN environments.

title: torp 0.0.0.9003 (development)
text: Re-optimized rating constants: RATING_DECAY_DEFAULT_DAYS (486→511), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_RECV (5.87→6.19), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_DISP (7.14→7.11), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_HITOUT (3→4.44). Re-optimized credit assignment constants disposal, reception, position adjustment.

title: torp 0.0.0.9002 (development)
text: Merged logging_monitoring.R safe_logging.R single logging.R file better organization. Fixed global state issues replacing <<- operator package-level environment logging state. Improved AUC calculation efficiency using Mann-Whitney U-statistic (O(n log n) instead O(n^2)). Fixed inefficient rbind() patterns compare_baseline_models() evaluate_baseline_models() using pre-allocated lists dplyr::bind_rows(). Fixed double fixture load get_afl_week() - now loads fixtures filters twice. Fixed mutate_all() performance issue data validation using lapply() column-wise operations. Removed unused match_id parameter match_xgs() function.

title: torp 0.0.0.9002 (development)
text: Added R/constants.R centralized AFL model constants: AFL_GOAL_WIDTH, AFL_QUARTER_DURATION, AFL_TOTAL_GAME_SECONDS RATING_DECAY_DEFAULT_DAYS, SIM_NOISE_SD, SIM_WP_SCALING_FACTOR Placeholder dashboard functions (create_monitoring_dashboard_data(), get_model_health_status()) now return informative empty structures instead fake data.

title: torp 0.0.0.9002 (development)
text: Added five vignettes: Getting Started, Player Ratings, Model Usage, Data Architecture, Season Simulation. Added pkgdown site configuration comprehensive reference sections. Improved README lifecycle badge, ecosystem table, torpmodels install instructions.

title: torp 0.0.0.9002 (development)
text: Reduced exported functions - internalized helper functions: rds_from_url(), file_reader() (internal data loading helpers) predict_wp_naive(), predict_wp_time_only() (baseline model internals) log_prediction_event(), log_data_quality() (internal logging helpers) Moved manual test scripts tests/manual/ directory. Archived legacy data-raw scripts inst/extdata/archive/scripts/. Enhanced test helper functions additional mock data creators.

title: torp 0.0.0.9002 (development)
text: Added tests helper_functions.R internal functions. Added tests match_xg_functions.R function signatures. Added tests sim-helpers.R simulation functions.

title: torp 0.0.0.9001
text: Initial development version. Core data loading functions AFL play--play, chains, xG, player stats. Expected points (EP) win probability (WP) models. Player rating system (TORP). Match prediction framework.
